Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class WebViewMessageBus

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Thread-safe implementation of IWebViewMessageBus for cross-WebView communication. Uses ConcurrentDictionary<TKey, TValue> for topic→subscribers and dispatches to all matching handlers.

public sealed class WebViewMessageBus : IWebViewMessageBus
Inheritance
object
WebViewMessageBus
Implements
IWebViewMessageBus

Methods

Publish(string, string?, string?)

Publishes a message to all subscribers of the given topic.

public void Publish(string topic, string? payloadJson = null, string? sourceWebViewId = null)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to publish to.

payloadJson string

Optional JSON payload.

sourceWebViewId string

Optional ID of the WebView that originated the message.

RequestAsync(string, string?, string?, CancellationToken) 

public Task<string?> RequestAsync(string topic, string? payloadJson = null, string? targetWebViewId = null, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

topic string
payloadJson string
targetWebViewId string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<string>

Respond(string, Func<WebViewMessage, Task<string?>>) 

public IDisposable Respond(string topic, Func<WebViewMessage, Task<string?>> handler)

Parameters

topic string
handler Func<WebViewMessage, Task<string>>

Returns

IDisposable

Subscribe(string, Action<WebViewMessage>)

Subscribes to a topic. Receives all messages published to that topic.

public IDisposable Subscribe(string topic, Action<WebViewMessage> handler)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to subscribe to.

handler Action<WebViewMessage>

Callback invoked for each matching message.

Returns

IDisposable

A disposable that removes the subscription when disposed.

Subscribe(string, string, Action<WebViewMessage>)

Subscribes to a topic with a target WebView filter. Only receives messages whose SourceWebViewId matches targetWebViewId.

public IDisposable Subscribe(string topic, string targetWebViewId, Action<WebViewMessage> handler)

Parameters

topic string

The topic to subscribe to.

targetWebViewId string

Only receive messages from this source WebView ID.

handler Action<WebViewMessage>

Callback invoked for each matching message.

Returns

IDisposable

A disposable that removes the subscription when disposed.
